VALIDATION_FAILED: There are validation errors in the form. Please check the data.
ERR_DATA_INTEGRITY_OR_ARGUMENT: The submitted information is invalid or already exists in the system.
ERR_COMP_IMPORTANCE_NOT_FOUND: Competence importance not found with ID: {0}.
ERR_COMP_IMPORTANCE_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete competence importance because it has associated relations.
ERR_VAL_COMP_IMPORTANCE_LEVEL: Level is required and must be at least 0.
ERR_VAL_COMP_IMPORTANCE_SIGNIFICANCE: Significance is required and only  letters, numbers and spaces are allowed.
ERR_LEVELS_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete level because it has associated relations.
ERR_VAL_LEVELS_VALUE: Level value is required and must be at least 0.
ERR_VAL_LEVELS_SIGNIFICANCE: Significance is required and only letters, numbers and spaces are allowed.
ERR_COST_DISTANCE_NOT_FOUND: Cost distance not found with ID: {0}.
ERR_COST_DISTANCE_SAME_COUNTIES: County A and County B cannot be the same.
ERR_COST_DISTANCE_ALREADY_EXISTS: Cost distance already exists between these counties.
ERR_VAL_COST_DISTANCE: Cost distance value is required and must be at least 0.
ERR_ROLE_LOAD_NOT_FOUND: Role Load not found with ID: {0}.
ERR_ROLE_LOAD_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete Role Load because it has associated relations.
ERR_ROLE_LOAD_CANT_BE_UPDATED: Cannot update the load value because it is being used in a project.
ERR_VAL_ROLE_LOAD_VALUE: Value is required and must be at least 0.
ERR_VAL_ROLE_LOAD_SIGNIFICANCE: Significance is required and only letters, numbers and spaces are allowed.
ERR_PERSON_GROUP_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete person group because it has associated persons or child groups.
ERR_PERSON_GROUP_CIRCULAR_REFERENCE: Circular reference detected: cannot assign a child group as parent.
ERR_VAL_PERSON_GROUP_NAME: Name is required and only letters, spaces and digits are allowed.
ERR_ROLE_EVALUATION_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete role evaluation because it has associated relations.
ERR_CONFLICT_INDEX_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete conflict index because it has associated person conflicts.
ERR_VAL_CONFLICT_INDEX_DESCRIPTION: Description is required and only letters, numbers and spaces are allowed.
ERR_VAL_CONFLICT_INDEX_WEIGHT: Weight is required and must be at least 0.
ERR_NATIONALITY_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete nationality because it has associated persons.
ERR_VAL_NATIONALITY_NAME: Country name is required and only letters and spaces are allowed.
ERR_VAL_NATIONALITY_GENTILICIO: Demonym is required and only letters and spaces are allowed.
ERR_COUNTY_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete County because it has associated relations.
ERR_VAL_COUNTY_NAME: County name is required and only letters and spaces are allowed.
ERR_VAL_COUNTY_CODE: Code is required and must contain at least one digit.
ERR_RACE_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete Race because it has associated persons.
ERR_VAL_RACE_NAME: Race name is required and must contain only letters.
ERR_RELIGION_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete religion because it has associated persons.
ERR_VAL_RELIGION_NAME: Religion name is required and must contain only letters.
ERR_CLIENT_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete client because it has associated projects.
ERR_VAL_CLIENT_NAME: Entity name is required and only letters, spaces and digits are allowed.
ERR_VAL_CLIENT_PHONE: Phone is required and may only contain digits, spaces, plus sign (+) and hyphens, and must have at least 8 digits.
ERR_PROJECT_STRUCTURE_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete project structure because it has associated cycles.
ERR_PROJECT_STRUCTURE_DUPLICATE_BOSS: A role with 'boss' type already exists in the project structure.
ERR_PROJECT_STRUCTURE_BOSS_WORKERS_LIMIT: A role with 'boss' type must have exactly 1 worker.
ERR_VAL_PROJECT_STRUCTURE_NAME: Name is required and only letters, spaces and digits are allowed.
ERR_VAL_PROJECT_STRUCTURE_ROLES: Project Structure needs at least one project role.
ERR_COMPETENCE_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete competence because it has associated relations.
ERR_COMPETENCE_DIMENSION_ALL_LEVELS: Level descriptions must be configured for all competency levels.
ERR_VAL_COMPETENCE_NAME: Competence name is required and only letters, spaces and digits are allowed.
ERR_VAL_COMPETENCE_DESCRIPTION: Competence description is required and only letters, spaces and digits are allowed.
ERR_VAL_COMPETENCE_IS_TECHNICAL: Define if it is a technical competency.
ERR_ROLE_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete role because it has associated relations.
ERR_ROLE_INCOM_SAME_ROLE: Role cannot be incompatible with itself.
ERR_VAL_ROLE_NAME: Role name is required and only letters, spaces and digits are allowed.
VAL_ROLE_DESCRIPTION: Role description is required and only letters, spaces and digits are allowed.
ERR_PROJECT_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete project because it has associated data.
ERR_PROJECT_ROLE_COMPETENCE_NULL: Competence is null in role competition.
ERR_PROJECT_NOT_BOSS_FOUND: No boss role found in project structure.
ERR_PROJECT_CLOSE_INVALID_STATE: Only projects in FINALIZED state can be closed.
ERR_PROJECT_FINALIZE_INVALID_STATE: Only projects in FORMED state can be finalized.
ERR_PROJECT_CYCLE_NO_STRUCTURE: Cycle has no associated project structure.
ERR_PROJECT_ROLE_NOT_FOUND_STRUCTURE: Role load not found for role in project structure.
ERR_PROJECT_BATCH_DUPLICATE_NAMES: Duplicate project names in the same request.
ERR_PROJECT_STRUCTURE_OR_ROLES_NOT_FOUND: Project structure or roles not found for project.
ERR_VAL_PROJECT_NAME: Project name is required and only letters, spaces and digits are allowed.
ERR_VAL_PROJECT_ROLE_WORKERS: Amount of workers is required and must be at least 1.
ERR_PERSON_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete person because it has associated relations.
ERR_PERSON_SELF_CONFLICT: Person cannot have conflict with itself.
ERR_VAL_PERSON_NAME: Person name is required and only letters and spaces are allowed.
ERR_VAL_PERSON_ID_CARD: ID card is required and must contain at least 8 digits.
ERR_VAL_PERSON_SURNAME: Surname is required and only letters and spaces are allowed.
ERR_VAL_PERSON_PHONE: Phone is required and may only contain digits, spaces, plus sign (+) and hyphens, and must have at least 8 digits.
ERR_VAL_PERSON_EMAIL: Email is required and should be valid.
ERR_VAL_PERSON_BIRTH_DATE: Birth date is required and must be in the past.
ERR_VAL_PERSON_CONFLICT_TARGET_ID: Target person conflict ID is required.
ERR_VAL_PERSONAL_INTEREST_ROLE_ID: Role ID is required for personal interest.
ERR_VAL_PERSON_TEST_BELBIN_ROLE_VALUE: Belbin roles only admit Preferred, Avoided, or Indifferent.
ERR_AGE_GROUP_CANT_BE_DELETED: Cannot delete Age Group because it has associated persons.
ERR_AGE_GROUP_OVERLAP: The age range overlaps with an existing age group.
ERR_VAL_AGE_GROUP_RANGE_INVALID: Minimum age must be less than or equal to maximum age.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_INITIAL_SOLUTION_REQUIRED: The initial solution must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_TRIALS_ROLE: The number of trials for obtaining a person is required.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_OPERATOR_REQUIRED: Operator to use must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_OPERATOR_TYPE_REQUIRED: Type of operator must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_EXECUTIONS: The number of executions must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_ITERATIONS: The number of iterations must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_CALCULATE_TIME_REQUIRED: Calculate Time must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_TRIALS_STATE: The number of trials to obtain a valid state must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_HC_RESTART_ITER: The iterations to restart Hill Climbing must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_TABU_SIZE: The Tabu list size must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_MOHC_NB_SIZE: The neighborhood size must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_MOHC_NB_DIST: The neighborhood distance must not be null.
ERR_VAL_ALGO_MO_TABU_SIZE: The multi-objective Tabu list size must not be null.
ERR_USER_ROLES_NOT_FOUND: One or more roles not found.
ERR_USER_INVALID_NAME_OR_SURNAME: Name and surname must have at least one part.
USER_PASSWORD_RESET: Password reset successfully to system default.
ERR_VAL_USER_PERSON_NAME: Person name is required and only letters and spaces are allowed.
ERR_VAL_USER_SURNAME: Surname is required and only letters and spaces are allowed.
ERR_VAL_USER_ROLES: At least one role is required.
ERR_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED_OR_USED: Token has expired or already used.
ERR_USER_NAME_NOT_FOUD: User not found with that username.
ERR_REFRESH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Refresh token expired. Please login again.
ERR_AUTH_NEW_PASSWORD_INCORRECT: New password cannot be the same as current password.
ERR_REFRESH_TOKEN_REVOKED: Refresh token has been revoked. Please login again.
ERR_TEAM_FORMATION_WEIGHTS_SUM_MUST_BE_O: All weights must sum exactly to 1.
ERR_TEAM_FORMATION_PROJECTS_NOT_FOUND: Projects not found with the provided IDs.
ERR_TEAM_FORMATION_NO_MEMBER_PROPOSAL: Could not generate any member proposal for the given role.
ERR_ROLE_BOSS_NOT_FOUND: No boss role found in project structure.
ERR_ROLE_BOSS_PROPOSAL: Could not generate any boss proposal for the project.
ERR_TEAM_FORMATION_IMPOSSIBLE_GET_PROPOS: Impossible to get proposal with current settings.
ERR_TEAM_FORMATION_SAVE_INVALID_STATE: You can only save projects with the status CREATED.
ERR_TEAM_FORMATION_NO_ACTIVE_CYCLE: Project does not have an active cycle.
ERR_TEAM_FORMATION_CYCLE_NO_STRUCTURE: Project cycle has no associated structure.
ERR_TEAM_FORMATION_PROJECT_NOT_CREATED: Project is not in CREATED state.
ERR_VAL_COMP_DIMENSION_NAME: Competence Dimension name is required and only letters, spaces and digits are allowed.

forbidden.subtitle: 403 — Access Denied
forbidden.message: You don't have the required permissions to access this page. Contact the administrator if you believe this is an error.

notFound.subtitle: 404 — Page not found
notFound.message: We can't find the page you're looking for. Check the URL or go back home.

serverError.subtitle: 500 — Server Error
serverError.message: An internal server error has occurred. Try reloading the page or come back later. If the problem persists, contact the administrator.

sessionExpired.label: SESSION
sessionExpired.subtitle: Session Expired
sessionExpired.message: Your session has expired due to inactivity. Please log in again to continue.
